name: Nolan
intro: Nolan, the Cosmic Wayfinder, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang .

abilities.name: Dimensional Rift
abilities.description: Damage The father who swore to protect his shining star. Nolan's skills will leave a Rift that lasts 5 seconds and slows enemies by 30%. When a rift comes into contact with another rift, they will activate and pull enemies to their center and deal 220 (+140% Extra Physical Attack) Physical Damage after a short delay. Each time a rift activation hits an enemy hero or Creep , Nolan will gain 15 Energy and heals 150 (+120% Extra Physical Attack) for himself. If an enemy is hit by multiple rift activations, the damage after the first hit will be reduced to 40%. Cosmic Leap: If Nolan does not deal or take damage for 5 seconds, he enhances his next Basic Attack to dash to the target, dealing (+120% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage and leaving a rift. (Damage to and from Minions or Creeps will not prevent Nolan from getting this effect.) Skill terms Pull Target Displacement: Cannot interrupt skills or Blink.

abilities.name: Expansion
abilities.description: AOE The scholar that explored the edge of the universe. Nolan cuts a rectangular area in front of him with his cosmic gauge, dealing 230–480 (+40% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage and leaving a rift at the first enemy hit.

abilities.name: Gauge
abilities.description: Mobility The wayfinder that measured the distance of the star Nolan charges in the target direction and slashes with his cosmic gauge, dealing 70–220 (+13% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage to enemies in his path and leaving a Rift .

abilities.name: Fracture
abilities.description: Burst The hero that finally returned home. Nolan slashes the target location 3 times, 120–180 (+50% Extra Physical Attack) Physical Damage with each slash while leaving 3 Rifts and slowing the target hit by 30% for 0.5s. The rifts will be activated automatically while Nolan dashes backwards.
